name: Wedding Soup (Turkish)
recipeIngredient: 500 g Mutton, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat, chopped onion, and carrot in a saucepan with 3 litres of water. Cover and cook on low heat for 2 hours until the meat is tender.
2. Remove the meat, breaking it into small pieces. Return the meat to the saucepan.
3. Melt 4 tbsp butter in a saucepan. Add flour and brown slightly for 2-3 minutes. Gradually add stock while stirring constantly. Pour this mixture into the soup. Cover and simmer.
4. In a bowl, beat egg yolks with lemon juice. Keep beating vigorously, adding small amounts of hot soup using a ladle. Stir in this mixture into the soup and turn off heat. Serve in individual dishes.
5. Melt 3 tbsp butter. Remove from heat and stir in paprika over the soup. Serve immediately.
